description: Lap 1 writes a corrected output.json: adds the missing image_link URI and fixes price from the string '14.99' to the number 14.99. JsonSchemaGate validates cleanly on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys.

interactions.agent_output: Read schema.json: id/title/description/price/currency/availability/image_link are all required, additionalProperties is false, price must be a number > 0, image_link must be a URI. Read output.json: image_link is missing entirely and price is the string '14.99', not a number. Adding image_link and fixing price to a numeric value.

actions.content:
{
  "id": "SKU-1001",
  "title": "Terracotta Ceramic Mug 350ml",
  "description": "Hand-glazed ceramic mug, dishwasher and microwave safe.",
  "price": 14.99,
  "currency": "USD",
  "availability": "in_stock",
  "image_link": "https://example.com/images/sku-1001.jpg"
}

interactions.notes: The fix — output.json now validates against schema.json. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
